title: Intel page uses metric-highlight-action cards
summary: The viewer Intel page should not render repo intelligence as long prose summaries. Use a small set of core cards with one big metric, one clear highlight explaining what is being flagged, and one action line explaining w
body: The viewer Intel page should not render repo intelligence as long prose summaries. Use a small set of core cards with one big metric, one clear highlight explaining what is being flagged, and one action line explaining what the user should do next. Keep detailed rows short and use drill-down sections for file-focused investigation.

context.fact: The viewer Intel page should not render repo intelligence as long prose summaries. Use a small set of core cards with one big metric, one clear highlight explaining what is being flagged, and one action line explaining what the user should do next.
